content:
PLAN: Make confidence operational.

Current state: confidence is 0-100 int passed to move!, used only for per-lane min_confidence auto-block. NOT stored on meta, NOT shown anywhere.

Changes needed:

1. board.clj — save-card! path: when move! runs, save :confidence on meta.yaml. Add to card map (assoc card :confidence confidence).

2. board.clj — global thresholds: read board config 'confidence' key with :auto-approve-threshold (default 0.9 → 90) and :needs-review-threshold (default 0.5 → 50). When requires_approval + confidence >= auto_approve_threshold: auto-approve instead of pending. When confidence < needs_review_threshold AND no per-lane min_confidence override: auto-block.

3. cli.clj — kb status: show confidence badge [C:75] next to card when set.

4. web/src/types.ts — add confidence?: number to CardData.

5. web/src/components/Card.tsx — show small confidence badge.

Files: src/kb/board.clj, src/kb/cli.clj, web/src/types.ts, web/src/components/Card.tsx
Was reading source to understand existing confidence code before planning. Ready to implement now — plan is written as a note on this card.

Plan: Implement kb whoami command

## Files to modify
- src/kb/cli.clj: add cmd-whoami function + dispatch entry

## Algorithm
1. Get cwd via (System/getProperty "user.dir")
2. Walk UP the path segments looking for .kanban/worktrees/{id} prefix in the full path string
3. If not found, fall back to git worktree list parsing: run 'git worktree list --porcelain', parse 'worktree /path' lines, check if cwd starts with any worktree path, then extract id from the path
4. Once id found: make-board (will find .kanban from id's worktree path or cwd), load-card
5. Output modes:
   - default: human-readable card id, title, lane, branch, base-branch
   - --json: stable JSON object
   - --export: eval-able export KB_CARD_ID=... lines

## Edge cases
- Not in worktree: exit 1 with message
- In subdirectory of worktree: path walking handles this
- Custom worktree path: git worktree list fallback

## Changes needed in board.clj
None — whoami is pure CLI logic using existing board functions

## Changes needed in agent docs
Update kb context (via board.clj lane instructions or CLAUDE.md agent section) to mention kb whoami

Plan: Global activity feed in web UI

## Backend changes
1. board.clj: add get-activity function
   - Reads all history.jsonl files from all cards
   - Returns merged sorted list of entries with card id/title/lane metadata
   - Supports :since (epoch cursor), :action filter, :limit
   - O(cards) scan — acceptable for boards up to 100+ cards

2. server.clj: add GET /api/activity route
   - Query params: since, action, limit (default 200)
   - Returns JSON: {entries: [...], next_cursor: ...}
   - Each entry: ts, card_id, card_title, card_lane, role, action, content, agent_id, gate

## Frontend changes
3. web/src/types.ts: add ActivityEntry interface
4. web/src/App.tsx: add 'Activity' tab alongside board view; subscribe to WS state updates to refresh
5. web/src/components/ActivityFeed.tsx: new component
   - Fetches from /api/activity on mount and on WS state change
   - Reverse-chronological list with timestamp, #card-id title, role/action badge, content
   - Filter bar: action type dropdown, time range (1h/6h/24h/all)
   - Auto-refreshes on WebSocket state push

## Files
- src/kb/board.clj: +get-activity
- src/kb/server.clj: +/api/activity route
- web/src/types.ts: +ActivityEntry
- web/src/App.tsx: +Activity tab switching
- web/src/components/ActivityFeed.tsx: new component
